initial_candidates.sql:
WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        o.customerid,
        SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_spent
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
    WHERE strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1998'
    GROUP BY o.customerid
),
spending_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.customerid,
        cs.total_spent,
        cgt.groupname
    FROM customer_spending cs
    LEFT JOIN customergroupthreshold cgt 
        ON cs.total_spent >= cgt.rangebottom AND cs.total_spent < cgt.rangetop
),
group_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        sg.groupname,
        COUNT(*) AS customer_count
    FROM spending_groups sg
    GROUP BY sg.groupname
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM customer_spending
)
SELECT 
    gc.groupname,
    gc.customer_count,
    ROUND(gc.customer_count * 100.0 / tc.total_count, 2) AS percentage
FROM group_counts gc
CROSS JOIN total_customers tc
ORDER BY gc.groupname;

WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        o.customerid,
        SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_spent
    FROM orders o
    JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
    WHERE strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1998'
    GROUP BY o.customerid
),
spending_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.customerid,
        cs.total_spent,
        cgt.groupname
    FROM customer_spending cs
    LEFT JOIN customergroupthreshold cgt ON cs.total_spent >= cgt.rangebottom AND cs.total_spent < cgt.rangetop
),
group_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        COALESCE(groupname, 'No Group') AS groupname,
        COUNT(*) AS customer_count,
        ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customer_spending), 2) AS percentage
    FROM spending_groups
    GROUP BY COALESCE(groupname, 'No Group')
)
SELECT 
    groupname,
    customer_count,
    percentage
FROM group_counts
ORDER BY groupname;

WITH customer_spending AS (
    SELECT 
        c.customerid,
        SUM(od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS total_spent
    FROM orders o
    JOIN customers c ON o.customerid = c.customerid
    JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid
    WHERE strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1998'
    GROUP BY c.customerid
),
grouped_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        cs.customerid,
        cs.total_spent,
        cg.groupname
    FROM customer_spending cs
    LEFT JOIN customergroupthreshold cg 
        ON cs.total_spent >= cg.rangebottom AND cs.total_spent < cg.rangetop
),
group_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        groupname,
        COUNT(customerid) AS customer_count
    FROM grouped_customers
    GROUP BY groupname
),
total_customers AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM customer_spending
)
SELECT 
    gc.groupname,
    gc.customer_count,
    ROUND(gc.customer_count * 100.0 / tc.total_count, 2) AS percentage
FROM group_counts gc
CROSS JOIN total_customers tc
ORDER BY gc.groupname;

    JOIN order_details od ON o.orderid = od.orderid

spending_groups AS (
